name: managed-agent
description: Managed agent platform framework and local runtime scaffold.

scripts.dev:all: MANAGED_AGENT_SECRETS_KEY=${MANAGED_AGENT_SECRETS_KEY:-managed-agent-local-dev-key} MANAGED_AGENT_MOUNT_ROOT=${MANAGED_AGENT_MOUNT_ROOT:-$(pwd)/.managed-agent/mnt} concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web-ui --prefix-colors green,magenta "MANAGED_AGENT_SECRETS_KEY=${MANAGED_AGENT_SECRETS_KEY} MANAGED_AGENT_MOUNT_ROOT=${MANAGED_AGENT_MOUNT_ROOT} npm run start --workspace @managed-agent/managed-agent-api" "npm run start:web-ui"
scripts.dev:all:pi: MANAGED_AGENT_RUNTIME=pi MANAGED_AGENT_SECRETS_KEY=${MANAGED_AGENT_SECRETS_KEY:-managed-agent-local-dev-key} MANAGED_AGENT_MOUNT_ROOT=${MANAGED_AGENT_MOUNT_ROOT:-$(pwd)/.managed-agent/mnt} concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web-ui --prefix-colors green,magenta "MANAGED_AGENT_SECRETS_KEY=${MANAGED_AGENT_SECRETS_KEY} MANAGED_AGENT_MOUNT_ROOT=${MANAGED_AGENT_MOUNT_ROOT} npm run start --workspace @managed-agent/managed-agent-api" "npm run start:web-ui"
scripts.dev:all:sandbox: MANAGED_AGENT_RUNTIME=sandbox MANAGED_AGENT_SECRETS_KEY=${MANAGED_AGENT_SECRETS_KEY:-managed-agent-local-dev-key} MANAGED_AGENT_MOUNT_ROOT=${MANAGED_AGENT_MOUNT_ROOT:-$(pwd)/.managed-agent/mnt} concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web-ui --prefix-colors green,magenta "MANAGED_AGENT_SECRETS_KEY=${MANAGED_AGENT_SECRETS_KEY} MANAGED_AGENT_MOUNT_ROOT=${MANAGED_AGENT_MOUNT_ROOT} npm run start --workspace @managed-agent/managed-agent-api" "npm run start:web-ui"
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.clean: shx rm -rf node_modules apps/managed-agent-api/node_modules apps/harness/node_modules apps/web-ui/node_modules
